description: Data files required by the TXTRS plan. Single class (`all`) so per-class entries expand to one path each. TXTRS uses unprefixed CSV names for decrements (e.g. `retirement_rates.csv`); the per-class fallback covers that.

files.purpose: Salary distribution by entry_age x yos x age_group
Active member headcount by entry_age x yos x age_group
Plan-wide salary growth schedule (yos x growth rate)
Current retiree distribution by entry age
New-entrant profile (entry age x start salary)
Withdrawal rates by yos x age group
Retirement rates by age x rate set
Early-retirement reduction table for grandfathered tier
Early-retirement reduction table for non-grandfathered tiers
Base mortality rates by age x gender x table
Mortality improvement scale (year x age x gender)
Initial funding state: payroll, NC rates, AVA/MVA, AAL
Synthetic cashflow stream sizing the current term-vested AAL
